action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace, 10h budget, 30 iterations. Task: FMoW satellite classification with worst-region accuracy on OOD test. Have CLIP-L/14 and CLIP-B/16 pretrained. 4x A100 48GB GPUs. Analysis: CLIP fine-tuning (FLYP-style) is SOTA for this task. Need to start with quick baseline to validate pipeline. Strategy: Fine-tune CLIP-B/16 first (faster), then maybe scale to L/14. Use class-balanced sampling or group DRO for worst-region. Decision: Start with quick baseline using CLIP-B/16, 1-2 epochs to test pipeline + measure time. Use DDP across 4 GPUs.
